title: Readiness Audit, Prior-Skill Retrieval, and Evidence Baseline · Transfer Studio
summary: An independent public-benefit team supplies different users, constraints, risks, technology, data, and failure conditions and transfers readiness audit, prior-skill retrieval, and evidence baseline into a changed mastery baseline and project readiness ledger. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of mastery baseline and project readiness ledger with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal de…
objectives: Map prior competencies to observable behaviors, dated artifacts, evidence strength, and unresolved gaps before selecting a product.
Distinguish reusable evidence, practice residue, generated output, sensitive material, and unsupported claims in an existing work sample.
Reproduce one prior behavior under a changed input, environment, or constraint and retain its exact pass or failure evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-1 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-1
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments

steps.title: Commit to the mission model · Lab Competency Inventory
steps.instruction:
lab case — A learner claims independent mastery from guided exercises, but a changed environment breaks the artifact and the evidence ledger has no dated reproduction. The lab variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Map prior competencies to observable behaviors, dated artifacts, evidence strength, and unresolved gaps before selecting a product.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Commit to the mission model · Lab Competency Inventory.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for map prior competencies to observable behaviors, dated artifacts, evidence strength, and unresolved gaps before selecting a product. For Commit to the mission model · Lab Competency Inventory, keep Competency Inventory connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.
